name: Pleasure Colosseum | Hooker Selector
description:
The Pleasure Colosseum is a massive brothel with almost 200.000 registered girls. At the entrance they ask you a few questions about your preferences to present you with the finest selection, curated just for you.

The Pleasure Colosseum concept allows girls from all backgrounds to work there as part-timers, so almost all girls have other jobs and occupations.
